text.title: Task Creation and Parallelization Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Task Creation and Parallelization.

example.scenario: F-066 batch: 100 methodology paths → 5 waves of 20 chunks. Each chunk has depends_on=[], wave=N, est_tokens≈80k, owner_model=opus. Wave graph is acyclic.
